title: Create item in current board with content from source item
excerpt: Monday automations allow for creation of an item on another board populated with data from the source/context item. Is this possible for creation of an item on the current board without going through an intermediate boar…

posts.author: mcallarse (Baika Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday automations allow for creation of an item on another board populated with data from the source/context item. Is this possible for creation of an item on the current board without going through an intermediate board?

When a pulse is complete, want the ability to create a new pulse with key fields populated and date/status fields empty.

posts.author: jackjack2202 (Jack Kubicek)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mcallarse

This is super simple to get going! All you need to do is select this automation and map it to the same board you are working within. Hope this helps.

posts.author: mcallarse (Baika Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @jackjack2202. I tried this prior to posting and it did not work.

posts.author: mcallarse (Baika Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: No idea what happened the first time, but working perfectly now. Thanks again.
